description: CompositionGreen scoop neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the front, a gingham bow, stud details and short sleevesWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet a good dose of biker chic with this studded green tee from the doodle collection of jealous 21. The graphic of the mysterious woman in the studded blazer is inspired by the laid back bad girl who knows that sooner or later she will get what she wants. Team this with skinny jeans and a black motorcyle jacket for instant cool.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
